title: Setup GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
description:
Create automated testing and deployment workflow for the project management dashboard. Scope:
1. Create .github/workflows/test.yml with: - Python testing on push and PR - Coverage reporting - Linting checks
2. Add pytest-cov and flake8 to requirements.txt
3. Add .flake8 config file
4. Configure codecov.io integration Goal: Ensure code quality and prevent regressions with automated CI.
